ui.commentPlaceholder: Faɗa mana wane tsari kuke son ingantawa, wane zane, sashi ko tsarin kuke bukata, da duk wani bayani na fasaha da zai taimaka wajen shirya hanya mai bayyana.
ui.formNote: Amsoshinku za su kasance ajiye ne a cikin wannan burauzar kawai har sai kun yanke shawarar tura su.
ui.contactRequired: Ƙara imel, WhatsApp ko sunan kamfani domin Hashinmy ta tuntuɓe ka da hanyar da aka shirya.
ui.copySuccess: An kwafi taƙaitawa. Za ka iya liƙa shi a WhatsApp, imel ko CRM.
ui.copyFailure: Ba a iya kwafin taƙaitaccen bayanin ba; aika hanyar zuwa Hashinmy ta cikin fom.
ui.mailOpening: Ana buɗe imel mai ɗauke da hanyar da aka shirya; duba shi kafin aikawa zuwa Hashinmy.
ui.technicalBase: Tushen fasaha da aka ba da shawara
ui.financedSubject: Hashinmy · software na musamman · tallafin kuɗi
ui.directQuoteAudit: ƙiyasin kai tsaye. taƙaitaccen aikin. hanya.
ui.proofLead: Hashinmy kwarewa: software na musamman. AI + aikace-aikacen atomatik. manhajar hannu + software na PC. tallafin 100% / ƙiyasin kai tsaye.
ui.proofTrustText: A wannan allo, abin da ake mai da hankali a kai shi ne tsaro, Zaɓi, domin hanyar ta riƙe mahallin kasuwanci da fasaha. Hashinmy yana mayar da wannan zaɓi zuwa hanya mai bayyanannen faɗi, matakan kulawa da matakai na gaba, domin kasuwanci ya iya sayarwa, aiki ko girma da ƙarancin cikas. Hashinmy kwarewa: software na musamman. AI + aikace-aikacen atomatik. manhajar hannu + software na PC. tallafin 100% / ƙiyasin kai tsaye.
ui.proofMethodText: Bincike, zane, gini, gwaji, miƙa aiki da tallafi. Medellín da Colombia ne asalinmu; isarmu ta duniya ce.
ui.proofUseCasesText: Kasuwancin kafinta, tallace-tallace, ajiyar kaya, farashin fasaha, tallafi, CRM, tashoshi, kasuwancin yanar gizo da sarrafa aiki ta atomatik.

intro.title: Barka da zuwa HASHINMY
intro.copy:
Muna gina software na musamman ga kamfanonin da suke aiki, sayarwa da girma a kasuwannin gida da na ƙasashen waje. Muna haɗa AI, sarrafa aiki ta atomatik, shirye-shiryen PC, software na CAD mai fitar da DXF, aikace-aikacen yanar gizo, cloud, SEO, chatbots, kayan ƙididdigar fasaha, tsaro da ci gaba da aiki.
Medellín da Kolombiya su ne asalinmu; isarmu ta kasuwanci da fasaha ta duniya ce.
Muna ƙarfafa ci gaban fasahar kamfanoni da mafita masu samun tallafin kuɗi 100%, muna taimaka musu su kai cikakken ƙarfinsu, su inganta aiki da kuma faɗaɗa cikin inganci.
intro.insight: Binciken farko yana taimakawa wajen mai da bukata ta gaske zuwa hanyar fasaha mai bayyana, mai yiwuwa a tallafa mata kuɗi kuma a shirye take ta girma.
